items.description: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have new initiatives to help enterprises deploy AI agents within their organizations. This is a trend that’s early but going to get very big fast. As agents enter knowledge work beyond coding, there is very real w…

items.title: What makes gbrain genuinely different?
items.title_zh: 是什么让 gbrain 真正与众不同？
items.description: What makes gbrain genuinely different? It's not a memory layer OR a code tool OR a search engine. It's all three unified under one graph with one query interface. Nobody else has that. And I use it all day with my 100k markdown file OpenCl…
items.description_zh: 是什么让 gbrain 真正与众不同？它不是存储层、代码工具或搜索引擎。这三者统一在一个图表下，并具有一个查询界面。其他人都没有这个。我一整天都将它与我的 100k markdown 文件 OpenCl 一起使用......

items.title: GBrain v0.27 just dropped
items.description: GBrain v0.27 just dropped - as promised, you asked for support for lots of other non-Anthropic and non-OpenAI embeddings and LLM support, so here it is. Multi-modal embeddings and deep photo OCR, description, and EXIF extraction coming sho…
items.description_zh: GBrain v0.27 刚刚发布 - 正如所承诺的，您要求支持许多其他非人类和非 OpenAI 嵌入以及 LLM 支持，所以就在这里。多模态嵌入和深度照片 OCR、描述和 EXIF 提取即将推出……
